items.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra Nearly Closes the Camera Gap
items.summary: Samsung has unveiled the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Fold8, and Galaxy Z Flip8. The new foldables embrace new designs, upgraded specs, and some better cameras. [Read More]

items.title: San Francisco Restaurant Defaced Over AI-Generated Food Photos
items.summary: A San Francisco restaurant has found out the hard way just how strong the anti-AI sentiment is after their cafe was defaced by disgruntled locals. [Read More]

items.title: Now You Can Change the Music on Your Instagram Post
items.summary: Instagram has announced that users can now replace the audio on a post or carousel without having to delete it entirely. [Read More]

items.title: This Image Led to a Photographer Being Sentenced to 74 Lashes in Iran
items.summary: This striking portrait of an Iranian singer in a black dress, her hair uncovered, has come at a devastating cost for the photographer who captured it -- resulting in a sentence of 74 lashes, a travel…
